summary: CR-MENU-0002: Note Corrections in Pre-Export Diff View — all 5 test cases passed. Akula Organics export modal shows both CORRECTIONS TO REVIEW [3] and NOTE CORRECTIONS [1] sections. Note diff item shows strikethrough + corrected text + NOTE EDITED badge. Ghatkesar shows updated all-approved copy. Export button regression working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-MENU-0001 and CR-MENU-0002 both fully verified. ExportModal receives noteCorrections prop and buildNoteDiffItems() correctly filters non-approve note corrections. data-testids working: export-note-corrections-diff, export-note-diff-item-{page}-{noteIndex}. Akula (0013): NOTE CORRECTIONS [1] shows P1·N1 NOTE EDITED with strikethrough original text → corrected text. Ghatkesar (0007): all-approved state shows 'All reviewed rows and notes were approved — nothing to inspect'. Export done state working.
